description: Green and grey, textured rucksack with multiple embroidered branding, has a flap secured with click-clasp closures, loop and toggle detail on the flap, straps with click clasps and adjustable loops on the sides for a compressed fitOne haul loop at the top, two padded and adjustable shoulder straps connected by click-clasp closure, and padded waist strap with adjustable click clasp closureOne main compartment withnbsp;dual drawstring closures, has a slip pocket insideThe flap has an external and an internal zipped pocketTwo mesh stash pockets with elasticated rim on both the sidesPadded mesh back with torsion fit systemWarranty: 5 years from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown.Warranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
